title: Do not reject when destination is remote
body: With default policy set to "type: reject" I am unable to "push" an image from docker-daemon to docker. This is unexpected. I want to protect my host to reject yet that should not prevent me from pushing from docker-daemon. Is there a way to configure policy to accept all from source type docker-daemon with default reject?

comments.body: Sorry, I thought this is a containers/image PR. Never mind.
